New Purchase Order

Create the order first, then add food items (product + farmer). Then create a shipment for delivery.

Can be a past date e.g. April 20

Update Order Status

Add Food Item to Order

Auto-filled from farmer's district

New Shipment

Update Delivery Status

Can be a past date. Stock updates automatically on delivery.

Add Product

Add Warehouse

Link Shipment to Order

Select the shipment that carries the food you ordered. The product, farmer, and location are taken from the shipment automatically.

Auto-filled from shipment quantity
Auto-filled from product price
